mechanism_narrative: A sustained decline in the federal funds rate signals an easing monetary cycle that compresses discount rates applied to equity cash flows, producing positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: Walk-forward Rank IC remains below 0.03 over any 2-year rolling window, or 20-day forward returns in easing periods are not significantly higher than baseline (t-test p > 0.05).

mechanism_narrative: A sharp increase in the unemployment rate above 8.5% signals deteriorating labor market conditions, prompting risk-off behavior that drives S&P 500 forward returns negative over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX produces positive 20d returns in > 60% of triggered instances despite negative signal, or Rank IC < 0.03 over any 3-year rolling window.

mechanism_narrative: Concurrent declines in GDP and industrial production indicate weakening economic demand, creating headwinds for corporate earnings and driving S&P 500 forward returns negative over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX produces positive 20d returns in > 60% of instances where both GDPC1 and INDPRO decline, or interaction effect is not statistically significant (p > 0.05).

mechanism_narrative: A combination of rising Fed funds rates and stable inflation signals a tightening monetary cycle, creating adverse financing conditions that drive S&P 500 forward returns negative over the next 60 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX produces positive 60d returns in > 60% of instances where both FEDFUNDS > 4.5% and CPIAUCSL < 2.0%, or interaction effect is not statistically significant (p > 0.05).

mechanism_narrative: Strong payroll employment growth signals robust labor market conditions, boosting consumer spending and driving S&P 500 forward returns positive over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX produces negative 20d returns in > 40% of instances with PAYEMS growth > 100k, or Rank IC < 0.03 over any 3-year rolling window.

mechanism_narrative: Rising industrial production indicates improving manufacturing activity, boosting corporate profits and driving S&P 500 forward returns positive over the next 5 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX produces negative 5d returns in > 40% of instances with INDPRO growth > 1.5%, or Rank IC < 0.03 over any 2-year rolling window.

mechanism_narrative: A surge in housing starts combined with rising retail sales indicates strong consumer demand, driving S&P 500 forward returns positive over the next 60 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX produces negative 60d returns in > 40% of instances where both HOUST > 500k and RSAFS > 350k, or interaction effect is not statistically significant (p > 0.05).

mechanism_narrative: A sharp decline in housing starts signals weakening demand for new construction, creating headwinds for related sectors and driving S&P 500 forward returns negative over the next 5 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX produces positive 5d returns in > 60% of instances where HOUST falls < 450k, or Rank IC < 0.03 over any 3-year rolling window.
